ddls:
CREATE TABLE "list_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each list item configuration */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content the list item belongs to */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the list-item */,
  "primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the item is the primary item in the group */,
  "section" TEXT /* String used to match this item */,
  "sticky" TEXT /* Whether the item sticks in place at the top */,
  "clickeffect5plus" INTEGER /* Whether an effect is displayed when the item is clicked */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the list item */,
  "mandatory" INTEGER /* Indicates if the item is mandatory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the list item configuration */,
  "rendering_layout" TEXT /* Layout for rendering the list item */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the item */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the item */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_list_items_content_type FOREIGN KEY ("content_type") REFERENCES content_types ("content_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_list_items_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES item_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_list_items_sticky FOREIGN KEY ("sticky") REFERENCES stickiness_options ("stickiness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_list_items_clickeffect5plus FOREIGN KEY ("clickeffect5plus") REFERENCES click_effects ("effect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_types" (
  "content_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the content type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content type */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon representing the content type */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color representing the content type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the item type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item type */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon representing the item type */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color representing the item type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stickiness_options" (
  "stickiness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stickiness option */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stickiness option */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stickiness option */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon representing the stickiness option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stickiness_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "click_effects" (
  "effect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each click effect */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the click effect */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the click effect */,
  "animation" TEXT /* Animation of the click effect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., content manager, editor, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "content_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content type */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_permissions_content_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_type_id") REFERENCES content_types ("content_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change in the item's history */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the list item */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete, create) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_history_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES list_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item version */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the list item */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the item */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_versions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES list_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item group */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the item group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item group */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the group */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the group was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_items" (
  "group_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group item */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item group */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the list item */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the item within the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES list_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_items_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES item_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item view */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the list item */,
  "view_layout" TEXT /* Layout of the view */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the view */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the view */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the view was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_views_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES list_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the list item */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who interacted with the item */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., click, view) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the interaction occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_interactions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES list_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the list item */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the item has received */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks the item has received */,
  "interaction_rate" REAL /* Interaction rate of the item */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the statistics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_statistics_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES list_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the list item */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who commented */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment text */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_comments_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES list_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the list item */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating score */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_ratings_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES list_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the list item */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag text */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_tags_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES list_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the list item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category text */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_categories_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES list_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_meta" (
  "meta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meta data */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the list item */,
  "meta_key" TEXT /* Meta key */,
  "meta_value" TEXT /* Meta value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meta_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_meta_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES list_items ("item_id")
)
